dynamic_instruction_template_default: Use the current page, app context, product context, user subject, and user details supplied by the app. If the issue can be answered safely, provide a direct answer and one suggested next step. If the issue needs human review, set escalation_recommended true and explain why in escalation_reason.
runtime_sections: Instruction template, when a dynamic ai_instruction_versions.user_prompt_template exists
